case_title: ERIK ARREOLA VS. MICHELLE FRANCES BROWNER

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ARREOLA, ERIK (PASSENGER) AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES (DRIVER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE HON. CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ERIK ARREOLA, DEFENDANT MICHELLE FRANCES BROWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. ,JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $124.00 SERVED OCT-04-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES (DRIVER)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES (DRIVER)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES (DRIVER)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARREOLA, ERIK (PASSENGER) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BROWNER, MICHELLE FRANCES (DRIVER) THIS ACCIDENT APPEAR FROM THE PHOTOGRAPHS OF THE CARS TO HAVE INVOLVED VERY LITTLE FORCE. ACCORDINGLY PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED HIS BURDEN OF PROVING THAT HIS MEDICAL EXPENSES WERE REASONABLY NECESSARY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO DEC-13-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.
